subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-22 in Oakland
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, this is a good meeting… This evening I shall relate to you the story of the sojourn of Bahá’u’lláh during the two years of his solitude on the mountain of Sarkalu.
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @love and unity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Baha'u'llah in Sulaymaniyyih, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @House of Justice
